name: IdsEdwBnfSumDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH SRC AS (SELECT B.BNF_SUM_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') RAW_SRC_SYS_CD, B.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, B.BNF_SUM_ID, B.BNF_SUM_DESC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.BNF_SUM B LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON B.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK), XFM AS (SELECT SRC.BNF_SUM_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC.RAW_SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE dbo.trim_default(SRC.RAW_SRC_SYS_CD) END AS SRC_SYS_CD, SRC.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, SRC.BNF_SUM_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, SRC.BNF_SUM_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM SRC) SELECT BNF_SUM_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, BNF_SUM_ID, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, BNF_SUM_DESC, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM XFM
